raw: {"plans":[[[3],[3],[3],[3],[2]],[[3],[3],[3],[2],[2]],[[2],[3],[3],[3],[3]]],"rationale":"The active trail appears to have just crossed the middle bridge and is now at the left-side junction around the 8 cluster. The most promising continuation is to keep moving left along the open gray corridor, then start bending downward into the vertical gray passage; the alternatives vary the timing of that downward turn in case the head is slightly offset."}
